findings.status: deferred — placeholder stubs for planned verification endpoints, not under active dev
findings.reasoning: verifications/email/ has 3 empty files (email_delete.rs, email_get.rs, email_put.rs). verifications/sms/ has 5 empty files with mod declarations but zero pub use re-exports and no routes. These compile but serve no purpose.
findings.solution: Delete all 8 empty files. Remove their mod declarations from the respective mod.rs files. If SMS verification is planned, track it as a feature, not as empty source files.

findings.status: deferred — dispatched to docs/DISPATCH_WORKFLOW_ERRORS.md; requires operator input on operational messages before implementation
findings.problem: WorkflowError string variants expose internal identifiers to clients
findings.reasoning: StepNotFound(String), InvalidCondition(String), SchemaViolation(String) pass through we.to_string() to the HTTP response body. EpochMismatch exposes both expected and actual epoch values. Waiver workflows may have a public variant — internal step names, condition parse errors, and server state would leak to untrusted actors.
findings.solution: Replace we.to_string() reason strings with human-written operational messages. Log full internal detail at error level for dev diagnosis. Keep error codes (2003-2014) unchanged. Global solution — sanitize in to_api_error_message() once so all future endpoints get safe defaults.

findings.status: deferred — real fix is operational alerting, not error mapping; dispatched to docs/DISPATCH_EMAIL_LOGGER.md
findings.reasoning: Variant fires in a spawned task after the 201 is already sent — never produces an HTTP response. Postmark rejection detail already persisted in email_postmark_log. Real gap: customer books but won't receive confirmation email, and no one is notified. Log line (warn-level) and DB row exist but nobody watches them during operations.
findings.solution: Build an operational alerting path via system error notification emails (see DISPATCH_EMAIL_LOGGER.md). Promote log level from warn to error when alerting is built.
findings.effort: medium — alerting feature, not a one-line fix

findings.status: deferred — photo system not yet designed; revisit when building photo experience
findings.problem: Photo upload uses extension-only MIME validation
findings.reasoning: Extension whitelist (jpg/jpeg/png/webp/gif) and MIME type derived from client-supplied filename. No server-side magic-byte verification. A renamed non-image with a .jpg extension would be accepted.
findings.solution: Read first few bytes and check magic numbers, or always serve with Content-Disposition: attachment.

findings.status: deferred — code fix shipped (let Some + tracing::error + continue); notification layer dispatched to docs/DISPATCH_EMAIL_LOGGER.md
findings.reasoning: availability_get.rs used NaiveTime::from_hms_opt(...).unwrap() for computed slot times. bookings_post.rs unwrap already removed in prior work. Invalid slot times from misconfigured operating hours would panic the handler (500). Replaced with skip-and-log, but the error still goes unmonitored — silent revenue loss if slots are silently skipped.
findings.solution: System error notification email when invalid slots are generated (see DISPATCH_EMAIL_LOGGER.md).
